layer_policy.layer_1_official_inventory: scenario source inventory only; not experimental evidence
layer_policy.layer_2_official_run_export: actual ToolSandbox run/export evidence with trajectories and result summaries
layer_policy.layer_3_derived_mechanism_suites: targeted ToolSandbox-derived mechanism evaluations with explicit provenance

manifest.safe_wording: frozen ToolSandbox official-run export subset; not a complete official ToolSandbox benchmark unless coverage reaches the official inventory under documented API configuration
